label: Functional Synergistics
description: Evaluates multiple active compounds that converge on a defined functional context.

defaultOutputs.name: Synergy Type
defaultOutputs.description: Classification of the interaction pattern between components (e.g., complementary, convergent, sequential, or stabilizing), based on pathway alignment and network topology.

defaultOutputs.name: Convergence Node
defaultOutputs.description: Shared biological pathway, process, or functional axis where both components demonstrate mechanistic alignment.

defaultOutputs.name: Functional Amplification Rationale
defaultOutputs.description: Mechanistic explanation describing how the interaction between components may reinforce or broaden pathway coverage within the defined functional network.
